questions.question: Which lifecycle hook is the correct place to access template refs and start timers?
options: onBeforeMount — the component is about to be attached
onCreated — runs immediately when the component is instantiated
onMounted — the DOM is ready at this point
onBeforeUpdate — fires before every reactive update

questions.question: There is no onCreated hook in the Composition API. Where does equivalent code go?
options: Inside a watch() call with immediate: true
Directly inside setup() or at the top level of <script setup>
Inside onBeforeMount() which fires at the same time
In a special created() option passed to defineComponent

questions.question: What is the correct pattern for adding and cleaning up a global event listener in Vue?
options: Add in setup(), remove in onBeforeMount()
Add and remove in onMounted() using a try/finally block
Add in onMounted(), remove in onUnmounted()
Add in onBeforeMount(), remove in onBeforeUnmount()
